text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Yasuda Kinen. Matikanetannhauser
pumps herself up for her race against Ikuno
Dictus while she enjoys a pudding she brought
with her from the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno Dictus comes to greet her before the race
and points out that the pudding is long expired.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though she's our rival, Ikuno Dictus is
relieved that Matikanetannhauser is able to avoid
getting sick before the race. We thank her for the
kind thoughts, and the Yasuda Kinen begins!
